2251270.name: Underpaid
2251270.description:
From Unemployed to Model Employee!

Learn the tricks of various professions, attend training courses, take on different contracts, improve your skills, and don’t forget to pay your bills.

But beware, your duties don’t end there. You’ll also need to investigate and uncover the mysterious stories hidden in these places.

WORK

Each contract requires a certain level of skill, which you can gain by attending training or working on the job.

A contract to clean a supposedly "haunted" house? No problem! Take training to become a janitor and another to become a ghost hunter, and you’ll have the skills to apply!

Working is fine, but earning money is better: upgrade your equipment, pay your bills… You’ll need to manage your money carefully, or you could find yourself in a tricky situation!

INVESTIGATE

Most of the contracts you’ll be offered are ones nobody wants, for reasons that aren’t always very clear.

Go to the location, do what’s expected of you, and investigate to find out the real reasons. You might even earn a bonus!
